deep_dive.title: DeepPySR -- A Symbolic Regression Framework with Dynamic Pruning, Pareto Selection, and Hierarchical Composition for Real-World Scientific Discovery
deep_dive.abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) discovers analytical equations from data, yielding glass-box models with directly interpretable formulas, unlike black-box methods that rely on unstable post-hoc tools such as SHAP or LIME. This transparency is crucial in clinical medicine and social science, but SR faces three challenges: high-dimensional inputs, principled selection of Pareto-front formulae, and data irregularities such as multicollinearity and class imbalance. We introduce DeepPySR, which addresses these issues with a dynamic variable-pruning schedule to remove irrelevant features during search, an exponential Pareto selection criterion that eliminates trade-offs between accuracy and complexity, and a multi-layer architecture for hierarchical symbolic composition. On four Feynman physics benchmarks and seven biomedical and social-science datasets, DeepPySR outperforms PySR and baselines on body fat (R$^2$: 0.794 vs.\ 0.702), heart disease (F1: 0.898 vs.\ 0.787), student performance (R$^2$: 0.964 vs.\ 0.948), and Raine BMI (R$^2$: 0.525 vs.\ 0.370), producing interpretable formulas aligned with domain risk factors.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: symbolic regression framework with dynamic pruning and Pareto selection
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 符号回归框架，包含动态剪枝与帕累托选择
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 符号回归框架，包含动态剪枝与帕累托选择
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 符号回归框架，包含动态剪枝与帕累托选择
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DeepPySR proposes a symbolic regression framework that dynamically prunes irrelevant features, uses exponential Pareto selection for formula ranking, and employs hierarchical composition, addressing high-dimensional inputs and data irregularities for real-world scientific discovery.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 符号回归（SR）能从数据中发现解析方程，但面临高维输入、帕累托前沿选择和数据不规整等挑战。本文提出DeepPySR框架，通过动态变量剪枝去除无关特征，利用指数帕累托选择准则有效平衡准确性与简洁性，并支持层次组合以应对复杂数据结构。在医学和社会科学等实际数据上的实验表明，DeepPySR能发现可解释的玻璃箱模型，优于传统黑箱方法。该工作为可解释科学发现提供了实用工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 符号回归（SR）能从数据中发现解析方程，但面临高维输入、帕累托前沿选择和数据不规整等挑战。本文提出DeepPySR框架，通过动态变量剪枝去除无关特征，利用指数帕累托选择准则有效平衡准确性与简洁性，并支持层次组合以应对复杂数据结构。在医学和社会科学等实际数据上的实验表明，DeepPySR能发现可解释的玻璃箱模型，优于传统黑箱方法。该工作为可解释科学发现提供了实用工具。

deep_dive.title: DegenDetector: Symbolic Recovery of Parameter Degeneracies in Bayesian Posteriors
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce DegenDetector, a framework for identifying and characterizing parameter degeneracies in posterior distributions as closed-form symbolic equations. By combining mutual information screening with alternating symbolic regression, we facilitate automated and interpretable identification of degenerate relationships without domain-specific input. While standard tools such as corner plots can indicate that correlations exist, they do not reveal the underlying functional form. DegenDetector fills this gap by expressing multi-parameter degeneracies as closed-form equations, providing interpretable structure that scales to high-order parameter spaces.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses symbolic regression to recover parameter degeneracies
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用符号回归恢复参数退化
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用符号回归恢复参数退化
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用符号回归恢复参数退化
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DegenDetector combines mutual information screening with alternating symbolic regression to discover closed-form symbolic equations for parameter degeneracies in Bayesian posteriors.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出DegenDetector框架，用于从贝叶斯后验分布中自动发现参数退化的闭式符号方程。该方法结合互信息筛选和交替符号回归，无需领域知识即可识别退化关系，并输出可解释的符号表达式。实验表明，该方法能有效从高维参数空间中提取退化结构，弥补了相关图仅能显示相关性而无法揭示函数形式的不足。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出DegenDetector框架，用于从贝叶斯后验分布中自动发现参数退化的闭式符号方程。该方法结合互信息筛选和交替符号回归，无需领域知识即可识别退化关系，并输出可解释的符号表达式。实验表明，该方法能有效从高维参数空间中提取退化结构，弥补了相关图仅能显示相关性而无法揭示函数形式的不足。

quick_skim.title: Input-to-State Stability Implications in Contraction Theory
quick_skim.abstract: For nonlinear control systems on normed vector spaces, we characterize an incremental input-to-state stability (ISS) type property in which the overshoot constant multiplies both the initial-condition and the input terms. Working through the associated variational system, we show that two properties are equivalent: an ISS-type bound on the variational system, and the incremental ISS-type bound on the original system. We further establish the equivalence between an infinitesimal contraction condition, expressed through a Lyapunov-type function, and an incremental Lyapunov condition. Each of these equivalent conditions yields a necessary condition and a sufficient condition for the ISS-type bounds, differing only in the input Lipschitz constant of the vector field. When the overshoot constant equals one, the infinitesimal contraction condition reduces to the standard norm-based contraction conditions. We establish these implications under mere continuous differentiability of the vector field, and we illustrate the results through sensitivity matrices and Lyapunov characteristic exponents.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Equivalence between contraction condition and Lyapunov-type function for ISS
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 建立了收缩条件与Lyapunov型函数之间的等价关系用于ISS
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 建立了收缩条件与Lyapunov型函数之间的等价关系用于ISS
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 建立了收缩条件与Lyapunov型函数之间的等价关系用于ISS
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper characterizes incremental ISS and shows equivalence between an ISS-type bound on the variational system and the original system, linking to Lyapunov-type functions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对非线性控制系统，刻画了增量输入到状态稳定性（ISS）性质，证明了变分系统上的ISS界与原系统上的增量ISS界等价，并建立了无穷小收缩条件与Lyapunov型函数之间的等价关系。这些结果为利用Lyapunov函数进行非线性系统稳定性分析提供了理论工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对非线性控制系统，刻画了增量输入到状态稳定性（ISS）性质，证明了变分系统上的ISS界与原系统上的增量ISS界等价，并建立了无穷小收缩条件与Lyapunov型函数之间的等价关系。这些结果为利用Lyapunov函数进行非线性系统稳定性分析提供了理论工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: stability analysis of dynamical systems using Lyapunov functions
